'''竏嗜-dh-r-d''' ('''kanadhredoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrat|quadrat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrat|quadrat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗜-dh-r-d
|-
! Lemma
| kanadhredoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinadhredoko|thinadhredoko]] || [[word:jinadhredoko|jinadhredoko]] || [[word:shinadhredoko|shinadhredoko]] || [[word:kinadhredoko|kinadhredoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunadhredoko|thuthunadhredoko]] || [[word:jujunadhredoko|jujunadhredoko]] || [[word:shushunadhredoko|shushunadhredoko]] || [[word:kukunadhredoko|kukunadhredoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunadhredoko|thunadhredoko]] || [[word:junadhredoko|junadhredoko]] || [[word:shunadhredoko|shunadhredoko]] || [[word:kunadhredoko|kunadhredoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunadhredoko|thunadhredoko]] || [[word:junadhredoko|junadhredoko]] || [[word:shunadhredoko|shunadhredoko]] || [[word:kunadhredoko|kunadhredoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenadhredoko|thenadhredoko]] || [[word:jenadhredoko|jenadhredoko]] || [[word:shenadhredoko|shenadhredoko]] || [[word:kenadhredoko|kenadhredoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonadhredoko|thothonadhredoko]] || [[word:jojonadhredoko|jojonadhredoko]] || [[word:shoshonadhredoko|shoshonadhredoko]] || [[word:kokonadhredoko|kokonadhredoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonadhredoko|thonadhredoko]] || [[word:jonadhredoko|jonadhredoko]] || [[word:shonadhredoko|shonadhredoko]] || [[word:konadhredoko|konadhredoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadhredoko|thonadhredoko]] || [[word:jonadhredoko|jonadhredoko]] || [[word:shonadhredoko|shonadhredoko]] || [[word:konadhredoko|konadhredoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦnadhredoko|thﾃｦnadhredoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦnadhredoko|jﾃｦnadhredoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦnadhredoko|shﾃｦnadhredoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦnadhredoko|kﾃｦnadhredoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanadhredoko|thathanadhredoko]] || [[word:jajanadhredoko|jajanadhredoko]] || [[word:shashanadhredoko|shashanadhredoko]] || [[word:kakanadhredoko|kakanadhredoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanadhredoko|thanadhredoko]] || [[word:janadhredoko|janadhredoko]] || [[word:shanadhredoko|shanadhredoko]] || [[word:kanadhredoko|kanadhredoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanadhredoko|thanadhredoko]] || [[word:janadhredoko|janadhredoko]] || [[word:shanadhredoko|shanadhredoko]] || [[word:kanadhredoko|kanadhredoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
